Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: 3:21 p.m.: Appearances for Monday, APR-23-2007: Motion to Enforce Settlement & Request for Judicial Notice: Marjorie Heinrich, Esq. for Defendants Sioneta Carmen and Zosimo Carmen; Plaintiff Mr. Segundo Almogela appears this day in Propria Persona.

The Court hears argument by both sides; Plaintiff Mr. Segundo Almogela requests an additional extension of time to procure legal counsel, which is denied by the Court. Thereupon, on the record, the Court orders the Settlement entered. Defense Counsel Marjorie Heinrich is ordered to prepare and submit the order for the Court's signature.

JUDGE: Hon. A. James Robertson, II; REPORTER: Denise L. Doucette, CSR #5963; CLERK: Marjorie Manzella (D-220).
